title: Citrusy Crispy Thai Cassava Curry
description: A bright, keto-friendly Thai curry featuring crispy cassava cubes tossed in a zesty coconut sauce with lime, tamarind, and spicy red curry paste.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add cassava cubes and fry until golden and crispy, about 6-8 minutes. Transfer to a plate lined with paper towels to drain excess oil.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tbsp coconut oil, tamari, lime juice, tamarind paste, erythritol, and fish sauce. Stir to combine and let the mixture simmer for 1 minute to meld flavors.
Pour in the coconut milk and water, stirring until the sauce is smooth. Bring to a gentle boil, then reduce heat and let it simmer for 5 minutes so the broth thickens slightly.
Add the Thai red curry paste and stir until fully dissolved. If using, add sliced red chili for heat.
Return the fried cassava cubes to the skillet, tossing them in the sauce to coat. Simmer for another 2-3 minutes so the cassava absorbs some of the sauce but stays crisp.
Remove from heat and stir in chopped cilantro.
Serve hot over cauliflower rice or enjoy on its own for a keto-friendly meal.
